rationale: Bug hunt C13 trivial (C13 only deleted files, no new code). Feature: faction boost_weight card weighting (q-20260415-010 answer A). When player rep >= 50 with a faction, cards giving rep to that faction appear 2-3x more often in FastRoute and Event pools. Two boost signals: biome dominant_faction (+1.5 weight) and card effect ADD_REPUTATION for high-rep factions (+2.0 per faction). Converts FastRoute from random to weighted selection.
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt C14 (merlin_card_system.gd _compute_faction_boost + _weighted_pick, merlin_game_controller.gd _get_fastroute_card context). Then feature: SFXEngine (q-20260414-006) or walk event biome pools.
